description: Instance-level metadata, horizon, units, statutory wait limit and calibration note.
Semicolon-separated operation stages that may use the machine.
Nominal unloading rate in tons per hour for hoppers; blank otherwise.
Relative speed multiplier for weighing/lab operations.
Embedded fixed setup time; mainly relevant for hoppers.
Machine opening time in minutes from horizon origin.
Machine closing time in minutes from horizon origin.
Time when the job becomes visible to the scheduler.
Suggested soft-priority multiplier for tardiness/queue penalties.
1 if the truck is known before arrival.
DRY, NORMAL or WET synthetic class affecting inspection/unloading times.
Synthetic service target used as soft due date.
Per-minute penalty derived from ANTT ton-hour compensation and truck load.
Required machine family for the stage.
All stages are mandatory in v1.
Exogenous release time; only stage 1 uses arrival time directly.
Minimum lag between predecessor completion and successor start.
Non-preemptive processing time if the operation is assigned to the machine.
1 because processing times already embed setup constants.
Assigned machine in the simple FIFO/earliest-completion baseline.
Waiting time since previous stage completion or arrival.
Flow time minus processing time under baseline.
Positive excess over 300-minute statutory wait limit.
